[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up portrait shows a person with pink hair posing indoors, holding one finger near their lips.

The main subject is a person shown from the upper chest up, facing the camera with their head slightly tilted. They have short, voluminous pink hair with wispy bangs and dark eyebrows, with long eyelashes and makeup including eyeliner and subtle lip color. Their left hand is raised near their mouth, touching or hovering at their lower lip, while their other arm is out of frame.

The setting appears to be an indoor room with modern furnishings. In the background, there is a dark doorway or door frame on the left, and large glass doors or windows with black framing behind the subject. Near the back, there is a countertop or cabinet with a light-colored surface and a vase holding white flowers. On the right side, there is a dark chair or sofa back and a wall with a framed picture hanging.

The lighting is soft and even, creating a gentle highlight on the person’s face and hair. The person wears a light-colored sleeveless top. They also wear a thin necklace with a small heart-shaped pendant and small dangling earrings. A ring with a small decorative shape is visible on the hand near their lips. The overall composition is a tight, front-facing camera angle with the subject filling most of the frame, while the background remains slightly out of focus.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a close-up of a person with pink hair indoors, looking toward the camera. Their hand is held near their lips and they wear jewelry including a heart pendant necklace and small earrings.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text is visible in the screenshot.]

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, medium shot portrait of a young East Asian woman with striking, large brown eyes and a soft, pouty expression. Her hair is a vibrant, pastel pink, styled in a messy, high bun with wisps of hair framing her face. She has a delicate, rosy makeup look with prominent blush, winged eyeliner, and glossy pink lips. Her right hand is raised, with her index finger gently touching her lips, revealing manicured nails with a pink and white swirl design. She wears a simple white ribbed tank top. Around her neck, a delicate silver chain with a small, open heart pendant rests. On her left hand, she wears a thin gold ring shaped like a butterfly. A matching silver bracelet with small charms adorns her left wrist. The background is softly blurred, showing an interior setting with modern decor. To the left, a hint of a cream-colored sofa and a dark doorframe are visible. To the right, a tall, dark cabinet with glass-fronted shelves holding decorative items, and a framed picture on the wall can be seen. The lighting is soft and diffused, highlighting her features and creating a gentle glow on her skin, contributing to a dreamy and ethereal mood. The color palette is dominated by the soft pink of her hair, the neutral tones of her attire and the background, with pops of metallic silver and gold from her jewelry. The overall style is reminiscent of a high-fashion beauty shot with a touch of anime-inspired aesthetics.
